# cutitaru

> Design, websites (Shopify, Tilda, or custom), and Google & Meta ads for businesses in Moldova and internationally. Remote — Chișinău and worldwide. Languages: Romanian, English, Russian. Solo — Adrian Cutitaru.

## Services (RO)
- [Creare site Moldova](https://cutitaru.com/design-web-moldova.html): Prezentare, landing, magazin — Shopify, Tilda sau custom. SEO de bază.
- [Shopify Moldova](https://cutitaru.com/magazin-online-shopify-moldova.html): Magazine online Shopify.
- [Reclame Google & Meta](https://cutitaru.com/reclame-google-facebook-moldova.html): Campanii plătite cu tracking.

## Services (EN)
- [Website design Moldova](https://cutitaru.com/en/web-design-moldova.html): Presentation, landing, or store — Shopify, Tilda, or custom. Basic SEO.
- [Shopify store Moldova](https://cutitaru.com/en/shopify-store-moldova.html): Full Shopify online stores.
- [Google & Meta ads](https://cutitaru.com/en/google-facebook-ads-moldova.html): Paid campaigns with tracking.

## Services (RU)
- [Создание сайта Молдова](https://cutitaru.com/ru/veb-dizayn-moldova.html): Визитка, лендинг или магазин — Shopify, Tilda или custom. Базовое SEO.
- [Shopify Молдова](https://cutitaru.com/ru/internet-magazin-shopify-moldova.html): Интернет-магазины Shopify.
- [Реклама Google & Meta](https://cutitaru.com/ru/reklama-google-facebook-moldova.html): Платные кампании с отслеживанием.

## Pages
- [Acasă RO](https://cutitaru.com/): Servicii, FAQ, contact.
- [Home EN](https://cutitaru.com/en/): English version.
- [Главная RU](https://cutitaru.com/ru/): Русская версия.
